Rule.name: six_parse_file
Rule.Description: Parse text files for display or feeding into the Generic Query

Argument.name: title
Argument.Description: Descriptive name for the action executed upon submitting this form (metaparameter)

Argument.name: paths
Argument.Description: Absolute path patterns selecting the input files, one per line ("paths" parameter). Paths starting with 'classpath' read classpath resources (no patterns allowed). If more than one file is selected, the path is stored in the record under the key _. Gzipped files (*.gz) are decompressed transparently. The patterns accept the wildcards ? and *.

Argument.name: unlimitedGlob
Argument.Description: Allow patterns to match more than 100 files ("unlimitedGlob" parameter)

Argument.name: skip
Argument.Description: Megabytes to skip at the beginning of the first file ("skip" parameter)

Argument.name: filterPattern
Argument.Description: Match pattern to select lines to examine ("filterPattern" parameter)

Argument.name: startPattern
Argument.Description: Match pattern to start sampling ("startPattern" parameter)

Argument.name: stopPattern
Argument.Description: Match pattern string to stop sampling after ("stopPattern" parameter)

Argument.name: maxRecords
Argument.Description: Maximum number of output rows ("maxRecords" parameter)

Argument.name: parser
Argument.Description: Specification for parsing lines into records ("parser" parameter) - either a known file type (tomcat.log, iiq.log, meminfo.log, plain) or a regexp with named captures extracting the fields. Unmatched lines will be appended to the last field of the preceding record. Default filetype: file name without compression and timestamp modifiers
